library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Lower part of a letter probably written by Abu ‘Ali Yehezkel b. Netanel Halevi, Ḥalfon's brother, while in Qalyub. Mentions Abu l-Fadl and Abu l-Ḥasan who are known from other IB VI documents. [Writer had received two shawls and a fūṭah (waist-wrapper) which in Qalyub were worth 1.5 dinars and 0.5 dinars respectively. Sends greetings to writer’s son Abu l-Fakhr, Abu l-Ḥasan al-Bazzaz (the clothier), and a different Abu l-Ḥasan. Asks for the news of the sick person in the house of the latter Abu l-Ḥasan. Makarim and his siblings also send greetings. ASE.]
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Qalyūb. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
